category_sources: source_facts.description says it parses binary .xcresult bundles from Xcode builds and test runs; official README describes interpreting .xcresult files
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub README heading identify the project as xcresultparser
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides overview, installation, CLI usage, output formats, and examples
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a non-empty value, so repo is returned as null per instructions
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe parsing Xcode .xcresult bundles from builds and tests with test result and coverage outputs
